title: worktree_ownership_seized event payload
$comment: Class: OPTIONAL_SPEC_ID. Records a FORCED ownership transfer of a worktree from a foreign owner to the invoking session via `caws worktree bind <name> --steal --reason <...>` (WORKTREE-ISOLATION-HARDENING-001 Fix 4). Distinct from claim --takeover (which writes a prior_owners audit array on the registry entry); this event makes a forced bind-steal first-class and queryable in the hash-chained log. Auditability of the forced transfer is the functional requirement.

worktree_name.description: Name of the worktree whose ownership was seized.

prior_owner_session_id.description: Session id that owned the worktree before the forced steal.

prior_owner_platform.description: Optional: platform of the prior owner (e.g. claude-code).

new_owner_session_id.description: Session id that seized ownership (the invoking session).

reason.description: Operator-supplied justification for the forced steal (required, non-empty).
